title: Microeconomics — Midterm Review
description: Flagship micro: elasticity blocks, S&D figure, shock flowchart, mind map.

outline.title: Microeconomics Midterm — Cheat Sheet
outline.notes: Studio econ blocks + figure + process (flowchart + mindmap)

blocks.title: Shifts vs moves
blocks.markdown:
| Change | Curve | Along curve |
|--------|-------|-------------|
| Income, tastes | Demand shift | — |
| Input costs, tech | Supply shift | — |
| Price only | — | Movement |

blocks.title: Revenue & elasticity
blocks.markdown:
| |ε| | Demand | Price ↑ → TR |
|------|--------|-------------|
| > 1 | Elastic | Falls |
| = 1 | Unit | Unchanged |
| < 1 | Inelastic | Rises |
